title: Craftable Chainmail Armor│可合成鎖鏈盔甲
description: Added Chainmail Armor recipe.│添加了鎖鏈盔甲配方。
body:
# 介紹│Introduce
透過將熔岩桶排成盔甲形狀來合成鎖鏈盔甲。在早期的版本中，玩家可以使用火來合成鎖鏈盔甲，現在火已經無法獲取了，就用岩漿取代。│Craft chainmail armor by arranging lava buckets into the shape of the armor. In earlier versions, players could use fire to craft chainmail armor. Now that fire is no longer available, lava is used instead.

**※你可以在"Gallery"中查看具體合成配方│You can check the specific craft recipe in "Gallery"**
# 更多│More
[點我](https://modrinth.com/user/Special_TT)查看更多我的作品。│[Click me](https://modrinth.com/user/Special_TT) to see more of my works.
